parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of overdrive applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Bass Cut: Cuts low end frequencies from the signal before the overdrive circuit.
parameters-en.TrebleCut: Cuts high end frequencies from the signal after the overdrive circuit.
parameters-en.Clipping: Selects the clipping mode. "Up" provides asymmetrical clipping with a bit of compression and saturation. "Center" provides symmetrical clipping with a bit of saturation and high headroom. "Down" is similar to "Center" except with more saturation and lower headroom.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
